checks.name: released-scout-install
checks.detail: Exact released Windows Scout verified SSH identity and prerequisites, transferred the immutable Compose bundle and runtime-only secrets, and completed 14 install phases with zero failures

checks.name: health-and-headers
checks.detail: Public HTTPS health identified ApiaryLens@0.1.0-preview.2+2fbcb9f at migration 0004

checks.name: protected-bootstrap
checks.detail: Rejected an invalid deployment code, then created the first owner and family; eight recovery codes issued

checks.name: session-rotation
checks.detail: Session refresh issued a new opaque cookie and immediately rejected the prior identifier

checks.name: family-roles
checks.detail: Invited and activated separate beekeeper and viewer sessions

checks.name: p0-records
checks.detail: Created 13 records across all MVP resource types

checks.name: private-media
checks.detail: Original and thumbnail round-tripped exactly; anonymous access was denied

checks.name: second-client-sync
checks.detail: Beekeeper pulled the complete change set and completed a follow-up

checks.name: conflict-and-idempotency
checks.detail: Duplicate replay was idempotent and stale edit returned the current server value as a conflict

checks.name: viewer-negative-authorization
checks.detail: Server denied viewer write, export, and invitation-management requests

checks.name: portable-export
checks.detail: Validated manifest, JSON, three CSV files, and original media in the portable export

checks.name: released-scout-lifecycle
checks.detail: Backup 9/0, update 12/0, repair 12/0, restore 9/0, rollback 12/0, keep-data uninstall 9/0, reinstall 14/0, and full uninstall 9/0

checks.name: populated-backups
checks.detail: Four verified lifecycle backups totaling 51,562 bytes were retained before the full uninstall

checks.name: secret-handling
checks.detail: Bootstrap and SSH credentials stayed in protected runtime inputs and did not enter the plan, process arguments, evidence, repository, diagnostics, or Scout history

checks.name: target-cleanup
checks.detail: Scout completed a full data-removing uninstall, then the disposable Azure VM, disk, IP, NIC, NSG, and network resource group were deleted
